form.formComment: Missed the frame when eighth (25.34) at this track at last run and returns here after a three months break. Has started fresh up three times for a win and a placing. Best figures puts her right in this.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Missed the frame when eighth (25.34) at this track at last run and returns here after a three months break. Has started fresh up three times for a win and a placing. Best figures puts her right in this.

form.formComment: Finished in the placings last time but the run prior he was an eye-catching winner scoring by one length in a Grade 5 at this track. Hard to top on the time from two back.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished in the placings last time but the run prior he was an eye-catching winner scoring by one length in a Grade 5 at this track. Hard to top on the time from two back.

form.formComment: Lifted to win two runs back and got the cash again last start over 435m at this track (24.57,) beating Paw Jelani. Can bring up a hat-trick.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Lifted to win two runs back and got the cash again last start over 435m at this track (24.57,) beating Paw Jelani. Can bring up a hat-trick.

form.formComment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when third (22.61) at Warragul over 400m. In form and can return to the winners' list.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Charged out of the boxes with a fast early sectional but gathered in and finished in the minors when third (22.61) at Warragul over 400m. In form and can return to the winners' list.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (24.54) at this track in a Free For All, finishing fourth and beaten 6 lengths. Goes well out of this box with a win and three minors. Tough field and looking to others this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (24.54) at this track in a Free For All, finishing fourth and beaten 6 lengths. Goes well out of this box with a win and three minors. Tough field and looking to others this time.

form.formComment: Finished third at big odds last time (24.68) over 435m at this track. Has to do a bit more.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished third at big odds last time (24.68) over 435m at this track. Has to do a bit more.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (24.67) at this track in a Free For All, finishing sixth and beaten 8 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Can feature in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Was out of placings last time (24.67) at this track in a Free For All, finishing sixth and beaten 8 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed two times. Can feature in the finish.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 2.75 lengths in 24.35, beating Sharni's Secret. Last start finished 6th over 435m at this track beaten 10 lengths (24.91) behind Ash Intention in a Grade 4/5 on April 5. Is a danger.
